title: phase-b-ship output
description: JSON emitted by phase-b-ship.sh. Covers Steps 13, 14, 14b, 15, 15b, 16, 16a, 16c of session-close Phase B. Partial completion is first-class: any sub-step can report status=not_attempted if a prior step failed. Exit 2 = merge conflict (partial JSON still emitted). Exit 0 = caller can reason about all sub-step outcomes including pipeline failures.

status.description: ok=kill attempted (even if no processes found), skipped=not in worktree or dry-run

killed.description: Portless process patterns that were killed

second_merge.description: Step 14: Second merge from main (catch up with changes during Phase A)

status.description: ok=merged cleanly, conflict=merge conflict (exit 2), skipped=on main branch or dry-run

main_repo_scan.description: Step 14b: Scan main repo working tree for uncommitted generated files before merge

status.description: clean=main repo working tree was clean, committed=generated files auto-committed, committed_advisory=generated files committed + non-generated files noted as advisory, advisory=only non-generated uncommitted files found (non-blocking), commit_failed=tried to commit generated files but git commit failed (non-blocking), dry_run=would have committed in non-dry-run, skipped=not in worktree or no main repo, not_attempted=prior step failed

committed_files.description: Generated files that were auto-staged and committed to main before the merge

advisory_files.description: Non-generated uncommitted files found in main repo working tree (non-blocking advisory warning)

merge_feature.description: Step 15: Merge feature branch into main (worktree only)

status.description: ok=merged into main, conflict=merge conflict (exit 2), skipped=not in worktree or dry-run, not_attempted=prior step failed

version.description: Step 15b: Version bump and tag creation

tag.description: Git tag created (e.g. v2026.04.77) or empty string

version.description: Version string written to VERSION file (e.g. 2026.04.77) or empty string

push_gate.description: Step 15c: CI pipeline gate before push. Modes: skip (default, defer if busy), wait (block until clear), force (push regardless)

status.description: ok=no running pipelines (or forced/cleared), deferred=CI busy and mode=skip (default), timeout=mode=wait timed out, skipped=gh not available / dry-run / skip-push

waited_seconds.description: Seconds waited in the push gate (only relevant in wait mode; 0 in skip/force modes)

status.description: ok=pushed, failed=push error (non-blocking), deferred=push gate set DEFER_PUSH (CI busy, work stays local), skipped=--skip-push or dry-run, not_attempted=prior step failed

detail.description: Error output on failure, flag reason on skip

tag_pushed.description: true if the version tag was pushed to origin successfully, false otherwise

status.description: passed=CI green, failed=CI red (beads must NOT be closed), skipped_push_deferred=push was deferred by gate (next session-close will push), skipped_*=other non-blocking skips

run_url.description: GitHub Actions run URL (when status is passed or failed)

plugin_cache.description: Step 16c: Plugin cache sync after push

status.description: ok=cache synced, skipped=not a plugin repo or dry-run, not_attempted=push failed so skip
